title: sideritis regimontana
intro: Sideritis regimontana, also known as Mountain Tea or Greek Mountain Tea, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Greece and Turkey. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sideritis regimontana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. This plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used to make capsules or tinctures for easier consumption.
